name: iter-openai-bridge
description: Vercel serverless API bridge that classifies Romanian user requests into categories using OpenAI. For use with Wix.

scripts.build: echo "No build step required for serverless API"
scripts.test:projects-intent: node --test tests/projects-intent-analysis.test.mjs tests/projects-icon-assignment.test.mjs tests/projects-safety.test.mjs tests/projects-brain.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-service.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-actions.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-sessions.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-adaptive.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-execution-definition.test.mjs tests/projects-prepare-action-compat.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-catalog-parity.test.mjs tests/projects-assessment-interactive.test.mjs tests/projects-contextual-interactive-generation.test.mjs tests/projects-ai-execution-plan.test.mjs tests/projects-execution-plan-completeness.test.mjs tests/projects-step-completion-gate.test.mjs tests/projects-proactive-ai-assistant.test.mjs tests/projects-execution-progress-and-archived-action.test.mjs tests/projects-roadmap-generation-lifecycle.test.mjs tests/projects-execute-action-generate-resource.test.mjs tests/projects-execute-action-mode-normalization.test.mjs tests/projects-generator-input-and-result-persistence.test.mjs tests/projects-atomic-execution-contract.test.mjs tests/projects-guided-questions-placeholder-and-transition.test.mjs tests/projects-execution-session-conflict.test.mjs tests/projects-ai-experience-phase1.test.mjs tests/projects-vercel-file-tracing.test.mjs
